_note: Pool additionnel de phrases pour la banderole. Fusionné avec les phrases embarquées. Regénérable par Claude — garder la voix : calme, littéraire, un brin d'humour, jamais culpabilisant.
50: Curiosity is a renewable resource. Almost.
25: The next prompt is the one that matters.
Precision is a kindness to your future self.
Three quarters spent. Spend the rest slowly.
10: The best stopping points look like this one.
Rest is part of the work.
Close the loop, then close the lid.
A good ending beats a rushed extra mile.
night: Past midnight, every idea seems brilliant. Verify at dawn.
Sleep is the best context window.
The night is for dreaming, not debugging.
Even Claude thinks you should sleep.
friday: Friday shipped is better than Monday perfect.
The weekend is a feature, not a bug.
weekly: A week of thinking is a lot of thinking.
